name: agent-action-runner
description: Agent-safe action and workflow runner for TypeScript backends with schema validation, approval, audit, and MCP export support.
author: Doompy

scripts.cli:smoke: npm run build --workspace @agent-action-runner/cli --if-present && npm run build --workspace agent-action-runner-cli-basic-example --if-present && node packages/cli/dist/index.js actions:list --config examples/cli-basic/agent-runner.config.json && node packages/cli/dist/index.js workflow:validate examples/cli-basic/workflows/retry-failed.workflow.json --config examples/cli-basic/agent-runner.config.json && node packages/cli/dist/index.js workflow:validate examples/cli-basic/workflows/retry-failed.workflow.json --config examples/cli-basic/agent-runner.config.json --runner examples/cli-basic/dist/agent-runner.js --format json && node packages/cli/dist/index.js workflow:explain examples/cli-basic/workflows/retry-failed.workflow.json --config examples/cli-basic/agent-runner.config.json --runner examples/cli-basic/dist/agent-runner.js --format json && node packages/cli/dist/index.js workflow:graph examples/cli-basic/workflows/retry-failed.workflow.json --config examples/cli-basic/agent-runner.config.json --runner examples/cli-basic/dist/agent-runner.js && node packages/cli/dist/index.js actions:openapi --config examples/cli-basic/agent-runner.config.json --runner examples/cli-basic/dist/agent-runner.js && node packages/cli/dist/index.js workflow:run examples/cli-basic/workflows/retry-failed.workflow.json --config examples/cli-basic/agent-runner.config.json --runner examples/cli-basic/dist/agent-runner.js && node packages/cli/dist/index.js mcp:preview --config examples/cli-basic/agent-runner.config.json --runner examples/cli-basic/dist/agent-runner.js --json
scripts.pack:check: npm pack --workspace @agent-action-runner/cli --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @agent-action-runner/core --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @agent-action-runner/express --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @agent-action-runner/fastify --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @agent-action-runner/http --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @agent-action-runner/mcp --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @agent-action-runner/nestjs --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @agent-action-runner/opentelemetry --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @agent-action-runner/testing --dry-run
